title: Dover Operating Companies Will Have a Substantial Presence at Premier Convenience Store and Retail Fueling Industry Trade Show
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Sept. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) today announced that the Company will feature multiple brands at the National Association of Convenience Stores Trade Show ("NACS Show") and Petroleum Equipment Institute Convention ("PEI Convention") in Las Vegas, NV, on October 1-4, 2022.

title: Hillphoenix Earns 11th Consecutive EPA GreenChill Store Certification Excellence Award
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Sept. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hillphoenix, part of Dover Food Retail and Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a pioneer in designing environmentally sustainable refrigeration systems, has earned the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's (EPA's) GreenChill 2021-2022 Store Certification Excellence recognition.

title: Vehicle Service Group Launches New Range of 2-Column Lifts in EMEA
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Sept. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ – Vehicle Service Group (VSG), part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and one of the world's leading automotive equipment companies, today announced the launch of a new range of 2-column lifts under the Rotary and Ravaglioli brands in the EMEA (Europe, the Middle East and Africa) region, called the Tomorrow Series and the Legend Series respectively.

title: Dover Corporation: Steady Booking And Undervaluation Would Keep You Interested
text: A higher backlog and greater-than-one book-to-bill ratio signal improved revenue visibility for Dover Corporation in 2H 2022. Higher productivity and improved price-cost spread would be margin accretive in 2H 2022.

title: Markem-Imaje Unveils eTouch-S Intelligent Print and Apply Labeling Solution
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Sept. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, today announced the launch of the eTouch-S intelligent print and apply labeling system, further enhancing its global portfolio of end-to-end supply chain solutions.
